name: gmail-mcp-server
description: Full Gmail control with multi-account support — search, read, send, draft, tag, trash, and unsubscribe.
long_description: MCP server for Gmail with multi-account support. Search emails, read messages and threads, send emails, create drafts, tag and organize with custom labels, trash/untrash, and unsubscribe from mailing lists. Includes a web-based setup flow that guides you through Google OAuth for each account — no manual JSON editing required.

tools.name: gmail_search_messages
tools.description: Search emails using Gmail query syntax with date shortcuts and per-account filtering

tools.name: gmail_read_message
tools.description: Read a specific email by message ID

tools.name: gmail_read_thread
tools.description: Read a full email thread by thread ID

tools.name: gmail_send_message
tools.description: Send an email or reply to a thread

tools.name: gmail_trash_messages
tools.description: Trash emails across multiple accounts in one call

tools.name: gmail_tag_messages
tools.description: Add, remove, or swap tags on emails

tools.name: gmail_unsubscribe
tools.description: Unsubscribe from a mailing list via RFC 8058
